{{Quote|Our inquiries are still incomplete, but at the moment it appears that Lieutenant Kosk and his men were attempting to make a little extra money on the side.|Grand Admiral Thrawn to Mazzic|<ref name="TLC" />}}
'''Reynol Kosk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]].

==Biography==
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Reynol Kosk was an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]<ref name="TLCSB" /> [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]]<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> who rose to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] by [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].<ref name="TLC" /> An acknowledged expert on the [[PLX-2M portable missile launcher]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|228|Kosk, Lieutenant Reynol}}</ref> he commanded the Imperial garrison on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Trogan/Legends|Trogan]].<ref name="TLCSB" /> In 9 ABY, Kosk was bribed by [[Niles Ferrier]] to attack what became the first meeting of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]], even after having been specifically ordered by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to leave the group alone.<ref name="TLC" /> Kosk and the majority of his force were subsequently [[Death/Legends|killed]] after a brief [[Ambush on Trogan|firefight]] with the gathered smugglers and mercenaries.<ref name="TLCSB" />

==Personality and traits==
Motivated by wealth and power, Kosk was the type of soldier that Grand Admiral Thrawn saw as a liability to his plans and wanted to remove from the Empire.<ref name="TLCSB" />

==Skills and abilities==
Kosk was trained to use a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]], and could pilot [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles.<ref name="TLCSB" />

==Equipment==
Lieutenant Kosk wore a stand Imperial Army uniform, and was armed with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. He also carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]], and [[survival pack]].<ref name="TLCSB" />

==Appearances==
